title: nestegis montana
intro: Nestegis montana, also known as the Pacific cherry or mountain cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nestegis montana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Nestegis montana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
